summary: Reframed the opening around Marisol's immediate physical position in the trauma-room sluice so the chapter enters from a different structural angle than the next chapter's broader systems-level opening, while preserving the missed machine-shop annex handoff from the previous chapter and leaving the already clean exit seam intact.
edits: Shifted the opening paragraph from a broad noon-and-odor setup to Marisol's in-scene physical stance with the brush and quarter-close notice.
Kept the previous-chapter continuity beat that first maintenance whistle passed before she reached the machine-shop annex.
Preserved the chapter's existing return-to-yard exit because it already feeds naturally into chapter 11's Teresa-sightline continuation.
